title: Arthur Berti | Cyber Threat Hunter
name: ARTHUR BERTI PETERSEN SCHOLZE
subtitle: TryHackMe Top 2% Worldwide #94 BR | CompTIA PenTest+ & Security+ Certified
typewriter_text: Offensive Security Specialist|Backend Developer|Bug Hunter|SOC Analyst
summary_p1: Cybersecurity professional with over 4 years of experience, specializing in Offensive Security and Backend Development. My career is marked by a continuous search for challenges, contributions to Open Source projects, and a strong focus on Security Research.
summary_p2: Currently, I hold the position of Cyber Threat Hunter & Investigator at IPV7 and work as a Young Apprentice in IT at the University of West Santa Catarina.
summary_p3: I am a Linux enthusiast, Bug Hunter, and I am ranked in the top 2% worldwide on TryHackMe (#94 in Brazil), a reflection of my passion and dedication to the security field.
summary_p4: I have practical and theoretical knowledge in various areas of cybersecurity, including: Risk Management, Vulnerability Analysis, and Incident Response, always applying a proactive mindset in identifying threats.
summary_p5: My career includes a confidential cybersecurity experience for a technology company in Uruguay, where I was responsible for executing critical tasks for the protection of sensitive systems and data.
summary_p6: I am fluent in Portuguese and English, with excellent oral and written communication skills. I am a self-taught, proactive professional who learns quickly and adapts easily to new situations, with the ability to work independently or in a team.
summary_p7: I am constantly seeking improvement and intend to specialize further in areas such as Ethical Hacking, Pentesting, Forensics, and DevSecOps, consolidating my career as a specialist in both defensive and offensive security.

exp3_desc: Working in cybersecurity for a technology company in Uruguay, I operated under strict professional secrecy (NDA). From the beginning, I was entrusted with the execution of critical tasks for the protection of sensitive systems and data, demonstrating a high degree of responsibility in the position.
exp5_desc: I developed a website in HTML (only the frontend part, as the backend was already ready)
exp6_desc: My start in the job market began here, I worked as a waiter, kitchen assistant, bartender and cashier manager. In short, I was a 'jack of all trades'

contact_quote: "Security is not a product, but a process."
